name: economist-agents
description: Multi-agent content generation pipeline that produces publication-quality blog posts in The Economist's signature style. Includes 10 specialized agents (architect, code-reviewer, devops, git-operator, po-agent, product-research-agent, scrum-master, test-specialist, code-quality-specialist, visual-qa-agent) and a domain skills library.
author: Owen Viney <oviney@gmail.com>
